title: schizoloma fraseri
intro: Schizoloma fraseri, also known as New Zealand quillwort, is a type of small, aquatic plant native to the southern hemisphere, particularly in New Zealand and parts of Australia. The plant has been found to have medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antifungal compounds. Research suggests that Schizoloma fraseri may have health benefits such as reducing inflammation and improving wound healing, although more studies are needed to confirm its efficacy. In herbal preparations, Schizoloma fraseri is often used in traditional medicine, although its exact preparations and dosages are not well documented, and more research is necessary to understand its potential benefits.
